title: Linked Chests
description: Tired of endless trips between storage rooms? Synchronize your storage, save time, and manage your resources with ease!
body:
![thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d62d2ed1698fbf0d6e48cb1d33ae480b96b5051_0.webp)

## Linked Chests – Organize Your Storage Like Never Before!
Tired of endless trips between storage rooms? With Linked Chests, you can connect multiple chests across your world, keeping your loot organized and accessible from anywhere! Synchronize your storage, save time, and manage your resources with ease!

## Linked Chest Creation
To begin, place a chest where you want and look directly at it. Execute the command `/trigger linkedc.create_link` while having an Ender Pearl in your inventory. Particles will appear to show the Linked Chest is created but not yet linked.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![trigger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfe91fcca97a9ab2a622b70d112f6cf0a6a639ab_0.webp)
  
![not linked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bed4e8ba14fa2cb4e346a55d3387dc3ce6727c39_0.webp)
  
</details>

## Linking Chests
Each Linked Chest is synced using a special item. Simply right-click on top the chest while holding the item you want to link. All chests linked with the same item will now be synchronized, sharing their contents instantly.

<details>
<summary>Let's create 2 Linked Chests to see</summary>
  
![linking with item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfc98c955df684de18483ef1dbdc7dd571547301_0.webp)
  
![2nd chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de411a9db068db79e8116c7b1cd29fb8afc9a09a_0.webp)

![item in the first chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d301bb3abc6e51d28db5b3e5169f9534ae66a78d_0.webp)

![2nd chest synchro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48eb86bdadbc07bf85b6187ecd65c5052a5b6e2e_0.webp)
</details>

## Breaking Linked Chests
To remove a Linked Chest, break it. The Ender Pearl and linking item will be returned. Hold sneak while breaking the chest to drop the contents as well. If other Linked Chests still exist, items won’t drop unless it's the last chest linked to that item.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![break linked chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6a20e9ed72f8606afbd4769147f43de2fe529a6_0.webp)

</details>

## Uninstalling
Ready to say goodbye to the Datapack? No problem! Simply follow these **simple steps**:

1. Access the Chat Window.
2. Enter the Uninstall Command and press Enter: 
```
/function linked_chests:uninstall
```
3. You can now remove it safely from the Datapacks folder, every trace of the datapack has been removed.

### Additional Notes
- Compatible with all other datapacks, following the standard conventions.
- This datapack was coded using JMC
